title: pyrola elatior
intro: Pyrola elatior, also known as wintergreen, is a perennial plant native to the boreal forests of North America. The plant contains methyl salicylate, a compound that has been used to treat pain and inflammation due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Wintergreen has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, muscle and joint pain, and menstrual cramps, among other health benefits. Wintergreen can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce discomfort.
